title: nuphar pumila var. spenneriana
intro: Nuphar pumila var. spenneriana, commonly known as the Spenner's water lily or yellow water lily, is a submerged aquatic plant that belongs to the Nuphar genus of flowering plants. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Nuphar pumila var. spenneriana include reducing fever, relieving rheumatism, and treating various skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the roots and tubers of the plant can be dried and used in teas, decoctions, or infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
